Description: The ATtiny25/45/85 is a family of low-power, high-performance 8-bit microcontrollers based on the AVR RISC architecture. It features in-system programmable Flash memory, EEPROM, and SRAM, along with a rich set of peripherals including timers with PWM, a USI for serial communication, a 10-bit ADC, an analog comparator, and a watchdog timer. Designed for efficient operation, it supports multiple power-saving modes and can run from 1.8V to 5.5V, making it suitable for compact, battery-powered embedded applications.

KeyParameters.Max CPU Speed: Up to 20 MHz (dependent on voltage and variant)

Functions.FunctionDescription: Reset input (active low) / ADC input channel 0 / debugWIRE I/O
External clock input / ADC input channel 3 / Crystal oscillator pin 1
External clock output / ADC input channel 2 / Crystal oscillator pin 2
SPI Master Out Slave In / Timer0 PWM output A / Timer1 PWM output A / ADC reference / ADC input channel 0 (alternate)
SPI Master In Slave Out / Timer0 PWM output B / Timer1 PWM output A (alternate) / ADC input channel 1
SPI Serial Clock / USI Clock / Timer1 PWM output B / ADC input channel 1 (alternate) / Timer0 external counter input
